channel.title: Micro Offer Studio Updates
channel.description: Generated offers, tools, and paid-inquiry paths. Confirmed earned money remains $0 until external proof exists.

item.title: Website Audit Microservice
item.description: Public website, landing-page, accessibility, mobile, copy, and QA quick-win audits. One accepted audit clears $100.

item.title: Data Cleanup Sprint
item.description: CSV/spreadsheet cleanup with normalized output, validation counts, and a short QA report. One completed sprint clears $100.

item.title: AI Workflow Tracker Sprint
item.description: A CSV-backed tracker and static HTML dashboard for interviews, leads, grants, or sales pipelines. One fixed-price order clears $100.

item.title: Static Demo Site Customization
item.description: A polished one-page starter site customized for a local service business. One starter site clears $100.

item.title: Niche Quote Estimator
item.description: A browser-only quote estimator customized for a simple service pricing model. One custom estimator clears $100.

item.title: Automation Blueprint
item.description: Trigger, data field, step, failure-case, and test-plan blueprint for a repetitive workflow. One blueprint reaches $100.

item.title: CSV Cleaner Lite
item.description: Free tool leading to Data Cleanup Sprint at $125. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full Data Cleanup Sprint and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Website Audit Lite
item.description: Free tool leading to Website Audit Microservice at $150. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full Website Audit Microservice and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Workflow Blueprint Lite
item.description: Free tool leading to Automation Blueprint at $100. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full Automation Blueprint and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Invoice/Expense Snapshot
item.description: Free tool leading to Invoice and Expense Tracker Template at $19. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full tracker template or a paid transfer and external payment proof exists.
